selection_basis.ledger_reason: This is the strongest compact operator-facing source-of-sources packet and the right parent for one bounded preservation pass before the thinner boot card.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the operator kernel capsule into a smaller preservation packet that keeps recall value high without letting thin entrypoints replace the thicker A2 boot hierarchy, conservative A1 live map, or shell quarantine.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Strongest next thin-entry reduction once the capsule's nonreplacement fences are preserved.
Strongest later verification packet after operator-facing reductions are stabilized.
Strongest later lineage-continuity packet if the queue moves from recall to manifest bridge work.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent capsule already contains the operator-facing authority, A2 boot, A1 live-map, entropy, and shell slices needed for this bounded pass, and the consulted A2-mid anchors already preserve the thicker boundaries that the capsule must not overcompress.

candidate_items.name: OPERATOR_AUTHORITY_PRECEDENCE_MINIMAL_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the first and strongest recall lock from the operator capsule.

candidate_items.name: A2_BOOT_REMAINS_MULTISTEP_NOT_SINGLE_ENTRY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the capsule thin without letting it collapse the A2 boot hierarchy.

candidate_items.name: LIVE_A1_STATUS_REMAINS_CONSERVATIVE_AND_CAMPAIGN_SCOPED
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent capsule's current A1 status read without live-map inflation.

candidate_items.name: ENTROPY_BOTTLENECK_STAYS_VISIBLE_IN_THE_CAPSULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the dominant open bottleneck explicit at the operator-facing layer.

candidate_items.name: OUTER_SHELL_MUST_STAY_VISIBLE_BUT_SUBORDINATE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the real engineering shell without letting it outrank the narrow authority core.

candidate_items.name: HELPFUL_GENERATED_SURFACES_ARE_RECALL_AIDS_NOT_OWNER_AUTHORITY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps helper and generated surfaces usable without promoting them.

quarantined_items.name: THIN_OPERATOR_CAPSULE_AS_SUFFICIENT_BOOT_SUBSTITUTE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent explicitly preserves thin-entry temptation as a tension instead of a resolved simplification.

quarantined_items.name: OPERATOR_CAPSULE_AS_AUTHORITY_OR_RUNTIME_CLOSURE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The capsule remains a proposal-side recall layer over thicker parent reductions and must not become authority replacement or closure proof.

notes: This batch preserves the operator capsule as a thin recall layer while keeping explicit the thicker hierarchy and quarantine conditions beneath it.
No raw source reread and no active append-save were performed.
